title: lomaria alata
intro: Lomaria alata, also known as the flat rock fern or alate lomaria, is a species of fern in the family Blechnaceae, native to New Zealand. The plant has been used in traditional medicine to treat various ailments, including fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions, due to its antimicrobial and anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of Lomaria alata include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve respiratory health, and act as an antiseptic. Traditionally, the plant is prepared as a decoction or infusion, and can also be used in the form of tinctures or ointments to harness its medicinal properties.
